backing.locator: Epoch AI trend data — no driver stall, so change arrives through diffusion, which is slow

claim: The M&A-clean pure-play CX aggregate (TTEC+TASK+IBEX) FY2026 headcount will remain within ±5% of its FY2022 baseline (141,468–156,331 vs. 148,887).

qualifier.scope: Total headcount only; boundary events excluded by the event-table rule.

rebuttal.bestCounter: An FY2026 demand shock or one supplier's collapse (TTEC strategic review) could break ±5% without any AI cause.
rebuttal.changesOurMind: Aggregate breach PLUS class-neutral posting mix PLUS control-arm co-movement is macro (this call misses, thesis unaffected); breach WITH frontline-biased mix shift in treatment only is deflection arriving — the thesis tracker moves to 'strained'.

referee: FY2026 10-Ks (TTEC, TASK by ~Mar 2027; IBEX Sep 2026 for FY2026)
warrant: Three years of system-level flatness with divergence absorbed by redistribution between suppliers; no capability-side discontinuity yet visible in deployment proxies large enough to break the pattern within one fiscal year.
